title: Tobar Wooden Sound and Play Ambulance Vehicle with Electronic Siren Assorted Designs and Colours
features: A claasic wooden Ambulance recue vehicle with some electronnc magic built in. Simply press down on the emergency light on the roof and hear the sounds of an emergency siren.
Solid wood, beautifully designed and with free spining wheels, it’s a great first push and pull Ambulance and fire rescue vehicle. Batteries are included.
Perfect for early child development, helps develop motor skills, imaginaition, story telling and role playing.
All Tobar wood toys are made from the highest quality, sustainable materials to ensure the best possible toys for kids

At Tobar product safety is paramount, all our toys are child-safe, completely non-toxic and meet and exceed all UK, EU and US product safety testing standards. An excellent gift for children ages 18 months +.
description: Introducing the One For Fun Tobar Classic Wooden Toys - a timeless collection that combines nostalgia with quality craftsmanship to ignite the imagination of children and adults alike. This range is a delightful blend of simplicity, creativity and quality. Crafted from premium, sustainable wood, each piece is meticulously designed to engage, entertain, and educate. Whether you're a parent seeking to foster your child's development or a collector yearning for a touch of retro charm, these toys are perfect for all. From timeless favorites like spinning tops and pull-along animals to challenging puzzles and beautifully painted vehicles, the Tobar range offers something for every age, interest and occasion. These toys encourage the development of fine motor skills, problem-solving, and open-ended play, making them an excellent choice for early childhood development. What sets our toys apart is our commitment to safety. Our toys are rigorously tested and meet the highest safety standards, ensuring worry-free playtime for kids and peace of mind for parents. They're built to withstand the test of time and the enthusiastic use of even the most exuberant child, making them playroom heirlooms that can be passed down through generations. In a world filled with plastic, technology and too many screens, our toys harken back to a simpler time when creativity and imagination were the keys to endless enjoyment. Discover the joy of play and the beauty of timeless design. It's not just a toy; it's a cherished memory waiting to be made. Tobar Wooden Toys are brought to you by One For Fun Toys, an industry leading manufacturer and distributor of toys, impulse items and collectibles. For almost 50 years we have offered high-quality, innovative and safe products that engage and enthrall children and adults alike. We strive to promote creativity, discovery, entertainment and imagination with products designed to delight and engineered to endure. From Impulse to Games, Plush to Outdoor, Figurines to Playsets. Along with Bburago, One For Fun offers Tobar and HGL toys, OzBozz Ride-ons and Maisto Collectible Diecast.
